targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, payload->>'no2' AS no2 FROM urbanpulse_history WHERE ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY ts
SELECT ts AS time, payload->>'pm25' AS pm25 FROM urbanpulse_history WHERE ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY ts

list.name: zone
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT payload->>'zone' FROM urbanpulse_history ORDER BY 1
